art_style.summary: Casual 2D vector-style puzzle game with a 'sweet' candy-like aesthetic, featuring soft beveled blocks and a warm chocolate-toned background.
art_style.rendering: 2D vector-cartoon with clean gradients and soft inner glows.
art_style.line_work: Thin, subtle dark-brown outlines on blocks to provide depth; UI text uses thick brown drop shadows.
art_style.palette: Warm and saturated, dominated by dusty pink, cream, chocolate brown, and golden yellow.
art_style.shading: Soft cel-shading with subtle top-down gradients on blocks to create a tactile, 3D-beveled appearance.
art_style.scale_feel: Toy-like and tactile; blocks feel like physical plastic or candy tiles.

assets.name: Main Background Plate
assets.scenario_prompt:
Using the reference frame/crop, recreate a clean gameplay background plate for the playable ad.

Asset: Main Background Plate
Description: A solid warm chocolate-brown background with a subtle leather or paper-like texture.
Gameplay role: Static background for the entire game screen.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D vector-style puzzle game with a 'sweet' candy-like aesthetic, featuring soft beveled blocks and a warm chocolate-toned background.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-cartoon with clean gradients and soft inner glows.
Line work: Thin, subtle dark-brown outlines on blocks to provide depth; UI text uses thick brown drop shadows.
Palette: Warm and saturated, dominated by dusty pink, cream, chocolate brown, and golden yellow.
Shading: Soft cel-shading with subtle top-down gradients on blocks to create a tactile, 3D-beveled appearance.
Scale / proportions: Toy-like and tactile; blocks feel like physical plastic or candy tiles.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, photorealistic, 3D rendered, hand-drawn raster, gritty, neon, minimalist flat.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.

Preserve the original scene composition, camera angle, palette, and lighting.
Remove foreground characters, projectiles, UI, tutorial hands, and transient VFX when they cover the background.
Reconstruct hidden background details plausibly and keep the result seamless enough to sit behind gameplay.
Do not create a poster, logo, new character, or new UI.
Return an opaque rectangular background plate, not a transparent sprite.
assets.animation_notes: Static background.
assets.background_plate_notes: The texture is very subtle; ensure the brown remains warm and not too dark.
assets.visual_description: A solid warm chocolate-brown background with a subtle leather or paper-like texture.

assets.name: Cream Heart Tile
assets.scenario_prompt:
Using the reference crop, recreate ONLY this asset as a clean 2D mobile game sprite.

Asset: Cream Heart Tile
Category: other
Description: A square cream-colored tile with a soft beveled edge and a light brown heart icon embossed in the center.
Gameplay role: Basic building block for puzzle shapes.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D vector-style puzzle game with a 'sweet' candy-like aesthetic, featuring soft beveled blocks and a warm chocolate-toned background.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-cartoon with clean gradients and soft inner glows.
Line work: Thin, subtle dark-brown outlines on blocks to provide depth; UI text uses thick brown drop shadows.
Palette: Warm and saturated, dominated by dusty pink, cream, chocolate brown, and golden yellow.
Shading: Soft cel-shading with subtle top-down gradients on blocks to create a tactile, 3D-beveled appearance.
Scale / proportions: Toy-like and tactile; blocks feel like physical plastic or candy tiles.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, photorealistic, 3D rendered, hand-drawn raster, gritty, neon, minimalist flat.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.

Preserve the source asset's silhouette, color family, proportions, camera angle, and readable details.
Improve video compression artifacts and make the asset crisp and production-quality.
Center the asset with comfortable transparent padding.

Remove everything that is not the asset: no background, no wall, no character, no hand cursor, no UI, no smoke/trail/impact particles unless explicitly part of the target.
Use a transparent background PNG when supported. If transparency is not preserved, use a plain simple background that can be removed cleanly.
Do not add new objects or change the gameplay read.
assets.animation_notes: Pulses slightly when part of a cleared line.
assets.visual_description: A square cream-colored tile with a soft beveled edge and a light brown heart icon embossed in the center.

assets.name: Main Score Display
assets.scenario_prompt:
Using the reference crop, recreate ONLY this asset as a clean 2D mobile game sprite.

Asset: Main Score Display
Category: ui
Description: Large, bold white sans-serif numbers with a soft drop shadow.
Gameplay role: Displays the player's current session score.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D vector-style puzzle game with a 'sweet' candy-like aesthetic, featuring soft beveled blocks and a warm chocolate-toned background.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-cartoon with clean gradients and soft inner glows.
Line work: Thin, subtle dark-brown outlines on blocks to provide depth; UI text uses thick brown drop shadows.
Palette: Warm and saturated, dominated by dusty pink, cream, chocolate brown, and golden yellow.
Shading: Soft cel-shading with subtle top-down gradients on blocks to create a tactile, 3D-beveled appearance.
Scale / proportions: Toy-like and tactile; blocks feel like physical plastic or candy tiles.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, photorealistic, 3D rendered, hand-drawn raster, gritty, neon, minimalist flat.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.

Preserve the source asset's silhouette, color family, proportions, camera angle, and readable details.
Improve video compression artifacts and make the asset crisp and production-quality.
Center the asset with comfortable transparent padding.

Remove everything that is not the asset: no background, no wall, no character, no hand cursor, no UI, no smoke/trail/impact particles unless explicitly part of the target.
Use a transparent background PNG when supported. If transparency is not preserved, use a plain simple background that can be removed cleanly.
Do not add new objects or change the gameplay read.
assets.animation_notes: Numbers count up rapidly when points are earned.
assets.background_plate_notes: The font is clean and modern.
assets.visual_description: Large, bold white sans-serif numbers with a soft drop shadow.
